title: I’ve worked with over 1,000 kids—the ones with the best people skills use these 6 phrases
summary_full: "Strong people skills are not the same as people-pleasing," says child life specialist and therapist Kelsey Mora, who's supported thousands of kids and families.
summary_public: "Strong people skills are not the same as people-pleasing," says child life specialist and therapist Kelsey Mora, who's supported thousands of kids and families.
